It installs dependencies, then builds all packages with turbo through the root build script."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Builder stage: install dependencies, build the monorepo, and prepare runtime artifacts
FROM node:20-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies required for native modules and building
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Ensure pnpm is available (preinstall enforces pnpm)
RUN corepack enable \
  && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate

# Copy project files and install dependencies (workspace-aware)
COPY . .

# Install dependencies with frozen lockfile for reproducible builds
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Build the monorepo (turbo-based build across packages)
RUN pnpm -w run build

# Collect built artifacts for the runtime image
RUN mkdir -p /app/dist/react /app/dist/svelte
RUN sh -lc 'if [ -d packages/react/dist ]; then cp -r packages/react/dist/. /app/dist/react/; fi' \
  && sh -lc 'if [ -d packages/svelte/dist ]; then cp -r packages/svelte/dist/. /app/dist/svelte/; fi'

# Runtime stage: keep the image small by only shipping runtime artifacts
FROM node:20-bullseye AS runtime
WORKDIR /app

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist
COPY server.js /app/server.js

EXPOSE 8080

# Serve the static files using a simple Node one-line server file
CMD ["node", "/app/server.js"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build stage: install dependencies and build the monorepo using pnpm and turbo
FROM node:lts-trixie AS build

# Install system dependencies required for native modules
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy only package manifest files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml* ./

# Enable Corepack and install the exact pnpm version required
RUN corepack enable \
    && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate

# Install dependencies (prefer frozen lockfile for reproducibility)
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the entire monorepo using turbo
RUN pnpm run build

# Runtime stage: only ship built artifacts
FROM node:lts-trixie

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the build stage. The monorepo packages are under /app/packages
COPY --from=build /app/packages /app/packages

# Expose a simple shell to interact with the container if started directly
CMD ["bash"]
"}

build

# Environment

*.ntvs*

*.resx

# Exclude any test artifacts
test-output
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build stage: install dependencies and build the monorepo using pnpm and turbo
FROM node:lts-trixie AS build

# Install system dependencies required for native modules
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker layer caching and workspace resolution
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml ./

# Enable Corepack and install the exact pnpm version required
RUN corepack enable \
    && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate

# Install dependencies for the workspace (frozen lockfile for reproducibility)
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the entire monorepo using turbo
RUN pnpm run build

# Runtime stage: only ship built artifacts
FROM node:lts-trixie

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the build stage. The monorepo packages are under /app/packages
COPY --from=build /app/packages /app/packages

# Expose a minimal shell so users can inspect the container if needed
CMD ["bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build stage: install dependencies and build the monorepo using pnpm and turbo
FROM node:18-bullseye AS build

# Install system dependencies required for native modules
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker layer caching and workspace resolution
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml ./

# Enable Corepack and install the exact pnpm version required (upgrade to a newer 10.x series for compatibility)
RUN corepack enable \
    && corepack prepare pnpm@10.32.1 --activate

# Install dependencies for the workspace (frozen lockfile for reproducibility)
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the entire monorepo using turbo
RUN pnpm -w run build

# Runtime stage: only ship built artifacts
FROM node:18-bullseye

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the build stage. The monorepo packages are under /app/packages
COPY --from=build /app/packages /app/packages

# Expose a minimal shell so users can inspect the container if needed
CMD ["bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build stage: install dependencies and build the monorepo using pnpm and turbo
FROM node:18-bullseye AS build

# Install system dependencies required for native modules
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy manifest files first to leverage Docker layer caching and workspace resolution
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml ./

# Enable Corepack and install the exact pnpm version required (aligned with repo's packageManager)
RUN corepack enable \
    && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate

# Install dependencies for the workspace (frozen lockfile for reproducibility)
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build only the React and Svelte packages to avoid issues with the monorepo's system package
RUN pnpm -w run build --filter=@xyflow/react --filter=@xyflow/svelte

# Runtime stage: only ship built artifacts
FROM node:18-bullseye

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the build stage
COPY --from=build /app/packages/react/dist /dist/react
COPY --from=build /app/packages/svelte/dist /dist/svelte

# Expose a minimal shell so users can inspect the container if needed
CMD ["bash"]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Runtime stage missing dependencies**  
   - **What failed:** Multiple `VerifyBuild` steps (3, 5, 7, 9, 12) reported that the runtime stage copied only built `/app/packages` artifacts but no `node_modules`, and did not run `pnpm install`. This caused missing runtime dependencies.  
   - **Fix:** In the final stage, either install production dependencies (`pnpm install --prod`) or copy the installed node_modules from the build stage (`COPY --from=build /app/node_modules ./node_modules`). Ensure the runtime stage can execute the start command without missing modules.

2. **Base image tag not universally available**  
   - **What failed:** `node:lts-trixie` caused step 5’s warning — the tag may not exist in all registries.  
   - **Fix:** Use a stable and widely supported tag like `node:18-bullseye` or `node:lts-bullseye` for consistency.

3. **Missing runtime command**  
   - **What failed:** Step 7 noted that the Dockerfile lacked a `CMD` or `ENTRYPOINT` to start the app.  
   - **Fix:** Add an explicit `CMD` (e.g., `CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]`) or the appropriate start script for your built package (often `pnpm start` or `node packages/<your-app>/dist/index.js`).

4. **Large COPY and pnpm symlinks**  
   - **What failed:** Step 16 warned that copying entire `/app/packages` introduced large `node_modules` and broken symlinks from the pnpm store.  
   - **Fix:** Copy only the dist or build output folders needed by the runtime app (`COPY --from=build /app/packages/<name>/dist ./dist`). Avoid copying the entire workspace.

5. **Build failure in monorepo build step**  
   - **What failed:** Step 18 failed at build phase `RUN pnpm -w run build --filter=@xyflow/react --filter=@xyflow/svelte`. The `pnpm -w` (workspace root) command could not complete — possibly missing dev deps or misconfigured turbo/pnpm workspace.  
   - **Fix:**  
     - Ensure `pnpm install` completes successfully before `pnpm -w run build`.  
     - Verify `pnpm-workspace.yaml` and `package.json` define all filters and build scripts for `@xyflow/react` and `@xyflow/svelte`.  
     - Consider `pnpm build --filter=@xyflow/react... --filter=@xyflow/svelte...` (triple-dot for dependencies) if turbo or pnpm requires dependency context.  
     - Ensure turbo is installed globally or via `npx turbo`.

6. **System dependencies consistency**  
   - **What failed:** Earlier Dockerfiles installed some native build tools but lost consistency between stages.  
   - **Fix:** If native modules are required, install build tools (like `python3 make g++`) only in the build stage and copy built output, not native build deps, into the runtime stage.

**Goal for next attempt:**  
Create a multi-stage Dockerfile using `node:18-bullseye`, install dependencies once, build with valid pnpm filters, copy only needed dist outputs, install runtime dependencies (or reuse node_modules), and define a clear `CMD`.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Builder stage: install dependencies, build the monorepo, and prepare runtime artifacts FROM node:18-bullseye AS builder ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive WORKDIR /app # Install system dependencies required for native modules and building RUN apt-get update \ && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \ && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # Ensure pnpm is available (preinstall enforces pnpm) RUN corepack enable \ && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate # Copy project files and install dependencies (workspace-aware) COPY . . # Install dependencies with frozen lockfile for reproducible builds RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile # Build the monorepo (turbo-based build across packages) RUN pnpm -w run build # Collect built artifacts for the runtime image RUN mkdir -p /app/dist/react /app/dist/svelte RUN sh -lc 'if [ -d packages/react/dist ]; then cp -r packages/react/dist/. /app/dist/react/; fi' \ && sh -lc 'if [ -d packages/svelte/dist ]; then cp -r packages/svelte/dist/. /app/dist/svelte/; fi' # Create a simple Node.js static file server to serve the built artifacts RUN bash -lc 'cat > /app/server.js << "JS"\nconst http = require("http");\nconst fs = require("fs");\nconst path = require("path");\nconst distRoot = path.resolve(__dirname, "dist");\nconst PORT = process.env.PORT || 8080;\nconst mime = {\n "": "text/plain",\n ".html": "text/html",\n ".js": "application/javascript",\n ".css": "text/css",\n ".json": "application/json",\n ".png": "image/png",\n ".jpg": "image/jpeg",\n ".svg": "image/svg+xml",\n ".ico": "image/x-icon"\n};\nconst server = http.createServer((req, res) => {\n let reqPath = req.url.split("?")[0];\n if (reqPath === "/") reqPath = "/index.html";\n const filePath = path.join(distRoot, reqPath);\n fs.stat(filePath, (err, stats) => {\n if (err || !stats.isFile()) {\n res.statusCode = 404;\n res.end("Not found");\n return;\n }\n const ext = path.extname(filePath);\n res.setHeader("Content-Type", mime[ext] || "application/octet-stream");\n fs.createReadStream(filePath).pipe(res);\n });\n});\nserver.listen(PORT, () => {\n console.log("Server listening on port", PORT);\n});\nJS' # Provide a minimal index page for root access RUN bash -lc 'mkdir -p /app/dist && cat > /app/dist/index.html << "HTML"\n\n\n XYFlow Build Container\n \n

XYFlow Build Container

\n

Built React and Svelte packages are available under /dist/react and /dist/svelte.

\n \n\nHTML' EXPOSE 8080 # Runtime stage: keep the image small by only shipping runtime artifacts FROM node:18-bullseye AS runtime WORKDIR /app # Copy built artifacts and server from builder stage COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist COPY --from=builder /app/server.js /app/server.js # Ensure the root page exists in runtime (fallback if needed) RUN mkdir -p /app/dist && bash -lc 'test -f /app/dist/index.html || echo "

XYFlow Build Container

" > /app/dist/index.html' EXPOSE 8080 CMD ["node", "server.js"] "}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Builder stage: install dependencies, build the monorepo, and prepare runtime artifacts FROM node:20-bullseye AS builder ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive WORKDIR /app # Install system dependencies required for native modules and building RUN apt-get update \ && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \ && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # Ensure pnpm is available (preinstall enforces pnpm) RUN corepack enable \ && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate # Copy project files and install dependencies (workspace-aware) COPY . . # Install dependencies with frozen lockfile for reproducible builds RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile # Build the monorepo (turbo-based build across packages) RUN pnpm -w run build # Collect built artifacts for the runtime image RUN mkdir -p /app/dist/react /app/dist/svelte RUN sh -lc 'if [ -d packages/react/dist ]; then cp -r packages/react/dist/. /app/dist/react/; fi' \ && sh -lc 'if [ -d packages/svelte/dist ]; then cp -r packages/svelte/dist/. /app/dist/svelte/; fi' # Create a simple Node.js static file server to serve the built artifacts RUN bash -lc 'cat > /app/server.js << "JS"\nconst http = require("http");\nconst fs = require("fs");\nconst path = require("path");\nconst distRoot = path.resolve(__dirname, "dist");\nconst PORT = process.env.PORT || 8080;\nconst mime = {\n "": "text/plain",\n ".html": "text/html",\n ".js": "application/javascript",\n ".css": "text/css",\n ".json": "application/json",\n ".png": "image/png",\n ".jpg": "image/jpeg",\n ".svg": "image/svg+xml",\n ".ico": "image/x-icon"\n};\nconst server = http.createServer((req, res) => {\n let reqPath = req.url.split("?")[0];\n if (reqPath === "/") reqPath = "/index.html";\n const filePath = path.join(distRoot, reqPath);\n fs.stat(filePath, (err, stats) => {\n if (err || !stats.isFile()) {\n res.statusCode = 404;\n res.end("Not found");\n return;\n }\n const ext = path.extname(filePath);\n res.setHeader("Content-Type", mime[ext] || "application/octet-stream");\n fs.createReadStream(filePath).pipe(res);\n });\n});\nserver.listen(PORT, () => {\n console.log("Server listening on port", PORT);\n});\nJS' # Provide a minimal index page for root access RUN bash -lc 'mkdir -p /app/dist && cat > /app/dist/index.html << "HTML"\n\n\n XYFlow Build Container\n \n

XYFlow Build Container

\n

Built React and Svelte packages are available under /dist/react and /dist/svelte.

\n \n\nHTML' EXPOSE 8080 # Runtime stage: keep the image small by only shipping runtime artifacts FROM node:20-bullseye AS runtime WORKDIR /app # Copy built artifacts and server from builder stage COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist COPY --from=builder /app/server.js /app/server.js # Ensure the root page exists in runtime (fallback if needed) RUN mkdir -p /app/dist && bash -lc 'test -f /app/dist/index.html || echo "

XYFlow Build Container

" > /app/dist/index.html' EXPOSE 8080 CMD ["node", "server.js"] "}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Builder stage: install dependencies, build the monorepo, and prepare runtime artifacts
FROM node:20-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies required for native modules and building
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates build-essential python3 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Ensure pnpm is available (preinstall enforces pnpm)
RUN corepack enable \
  && corepack prepare pnpm@9.2.0 --activate

# Copy project files and install dependencies (workspace-aware)
COPY . .

# Install dependencies with frozen lockfile for reproducible builds
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Build the monorepo (turbo-based build across packages)
RUN pnpm -w run build

# Collect built artifacts for the runtime image
RUN mkdir -p /app/dist/react /app/dist/svelte
